sentences.en: The payback period on our paid campaigns shortened from 9 months to 6.
sentences.zh: 我们付费推广的回收期从9个月缩短到了6个月。

sentences.en: Deep linking from the email campaign drove a 30% lift in app opens.
sentences.zh: 邮件营销中的深度链接使App打开率提升了30%。

sentences.en: We are seeing diminishing returns on Facebook ads — time to diversify channels.
sentences.zh: Facebook广告的边际效益在递减——是时候拓展其他渠道了。

sentences.en: The loyalty program increased repeat purchase rate by 18%.
sentences.zh: 忠诚度计划使复购率提升了18%。

sentences.en: Attribution modeling shows that branded search captures most of the credit.
sentences.zh: 归因模型显示品牌搜索获得了大部分归因。

example.en: A shorter payback period allows us to reinvest profits sooner.
example.zh: 更短的回收期让我们能更快地再投入利润。

example.en: Deep linking takes users directly to the relevant in-app page.
example.zh: 深度链接直接将用户带到App内的相关页面。

example.en: After spending $100K, we hit diminishing returns on that channel.
example.zh: 花费10万美元后，该渠道进入了边际效益递减阶段。

example.en: Our loyalty program rewards users with points for every trade.
example.zh: 我们的忠诚度计划对每笔交易奖励用户积分。

example.en: Multi-touch attribution gives credit to every channel in the user journey.
example.zh: 多触点归因将用户旅程中每个渠道都纳入归因。

sentences.en: The session duration increased after we added personalized watchlists.
sentences.zh: 添加个性化自选股列表后，会话时长增加了。

sentences.en: We need to deprecate the legacy API by end of Q3.
sentences.zh: 我们需要在Q3结束前弃用旧版API。

sentences.en: The error rate on the payment gateway exceeded our SLA threshold.
sentences.zh: 支付网关的错误率超过了我们的SLA阈值。

sentences.en: User interviews revealed that the search function is the top pain point.
sentences.zh: 用户访谈显示搜索功能是最大的痛点。

sentences.en: We rolled back the release after discovering a data consistency bug.
sentences.zh: 发现数据一致性问题后，我们回滚了这次发布。

example.en: We will deprecate the v1 endpoint and migrate all clients to v2.
example.zh: 我们将弃用v1接口，把所有客户端迁移到v2。

vocabulary.meaning: 服务等级协议（Service Level Agreement）

example.en: Our SLA guarantees 99.95% uptime for premium clients.
example.zh: 我们的SLA向高级客户保证99.95%的正常运行时间。

example.en: Identifying user pain points is the first step in product improvement.
example.zh: 识别用户痛点是产品改进的第一步。

example.en: The team decided to roll back to the previous stable version.
example.zh: 团队决定回滚到之前的稳定版本。

example.en: Users can add up to 50 stocks to their watchlist.
example.zh: 用户最多可以将50只股票加入自选股列表。

sentences.en: The stock corrected 15% after the company missed revenue guidance.
sentences.zh: 公司未达营收指引后，股价回调了15%。

sentences.en: Short interest in the stock has risen to 8% of the float.
sentences.zh: 该股的做空比例已升至流通股的8%。

sentences.en: The fund manager rebalanced the portfolio to reduce exposure to tech.
sentences.zh: 基金经理重新调整了投资组合以降低对科技板块的敞口。

sentences.en: Return on equity improved to 18% thanks to better capital allocation.
sentences.zh: 得益于更好的资本配置，净资产收益率提升至18%。

sentences.en: The company is trading below book value, which may signal a value trap.
sentences.zh: 公司市值低于账面价值，这可能意味着价值陷阱。

example.en: Management raised full-year revenue guidance by 5%.
example.zh: 管理层将全年营收指引上调了5%。

example.en: Rising short interest suggests growing bearish sentiment.
example.zh: 做空比例上升表明看空情绪在增长。

example.en: Institutional investors rebalance their portfolios at the end of each quarter.
example.zh: 机构投资者在每个季度末重新调配投资组合。

example.en: A consistently high return on equity indicates efficient use of shareholder capital.
example.zh: 持续较高的净资产收益率表明股东资本使用效率高。

example.en: Trading below book value may attract value investors.
example.zh: 低于账面价值交易可能会吸引价值投资者。

sentences.en: The performance review cycle starts next Monday — please prepare your self-assessments.
sentences.zh: 绩效评估周期下周一开始——请准备好你的自评。

sentences.en: We reduced meeting overhead by switching to asynchronous status updates.
sentences.zh: 通过改为异步状态更新，我们减少了会议开销。

sentences.en: The mentorship program paired 20 junior employees with senior leaders.
sentences.zh: 导师计划将20名初级员工与高级领导配对。

sentences.en: I appreciate your initiative on the automation project — it saved the team 10 hours a week.
sentences.zh: 感谢你在自动化项目上的主动性——它每周为团队节省了10小时。

sentences.en: We need better documentation to reduce the bus factor on critical systems.
sentences.zh: 我们需要更好的文档来降低关键系统的人员依赖风险。

example.en: A thorough self-assessment helps managers understand your perspective.
example.zh: 详尽的自评有助于管理者了解你的视角。

example.en: Asynchronous communication reduces interruptions and improves focus.
example.zh: 异步沟通减少了中断并提升了专注度。

example.en: Effective mentorship accelerates career growth for junior employees.
example.zh: 有效的导师制能加速初级员工的职业成长。

example.en: Taking initiative on difficult problems is a sign of leadership potential.
example.zh: 主动承担困难问题是领导力潜质的表现。

vocabulary.meaning: 人员依赖风险（关键人因子）

example.en: A bus factor of one means the project is at risk if that person leaves.
example.zh: 关键人因子为一意味着如果那个人离开，项目就有风险。

sentences.en: The first-mover advantage in this niche will be hard to replicate.
sentences.zh: 在这个细分市场的先发优势将很难复制。

sentences.en: We should consider a joint venture to enter the regulated market.
sentences.zh: 我们应该考虑通过合资企业进入受监管市场。

sentences.en: The SWOT analysis highlighted our weak distribution network.
sentences.zh: SWOT分析突显了我们薄弱的分销网络。

sentences.en: Customer lifetime value must be at least three times the acquisition cost.
sentences.zh: 客户生命周期价值必须至少是获客成本的三倍。

sentences.en: Our go-to-market strategy relies heavily on channel partnerships.
sentences.zh: 我们的上市策略严重依赖渠道合作伙伴。

example.en: The first-mover advantage allowed us to capture 40% market share early on.
example.zh: 先发优势让我们早期就占据了40%的市场份额。

example.en: The joint venture combined our technology with their local expertise.
example.zh: 合资企业将我们的技术与他们的本地经验相结合。

vocabulary.meaning: SWOT分析（优势、劣势、机会、威胁）

example.en: We conduct a SWOT analysis annually to reassess our strategic position.
example.zh: 我们每年进行一次SWOT分析以重新评估战略定位。

example.en: Improving retention by 5% can increase lifetime value by up to 25%.
example.zh: 留存率提高5%可以使生命周期价值提升高达25%。

example.en: The go-to-market plan includes a phased rollout starting with Hong Kong.
example.zh: 上市策略计划包括从香港开始的分阶段推出。
